# Arcadeum

> Free online board games — play with friends in your browser.

Arcadeum is a browser-based multiplayer platform for classic board games: Battleship (Sea Battle), Critical, Glimworm, Tic-Tac-Toe, and Cascade. Create a private room, share the link, and play instantly — no download, no signup.

## Core Games

- **Sea Battle (Battleship)** — Sink your opponent's fleet in this classic strategy game.
- **Critical** — A strategic card game: draw, defuse, and survive the explosion.
- **Glimworm** — Real-time glow-worm snake arena for up to 10 players.
- **Tic-Tac-Toe** — Six themed variants, 2–4 players, optional teams.
- **Cascade** — Shedding card game with stacking chains and four themes.

## Features

- Multiplayer with friends (private rooms, shareable links)
- AI bots for solo practice
- Real-time chat
- Player profiles, stats, and leaderboards
- Daily rewards and cosmetic shop
- No download required — runs in any modern browser
- Available in English, Spanish, French, Russian, and Belarusian

## Pages

- [Home](https://arcadeum.games/en): Landing page with featured games and overview
- [Games](https://arcadeum.games/en/games): Browse all games and join rooms
- [Sea Battle](https://arcadeum.games/en/games/sea-battle): Classic Battleship strategy game
- [Critical](https://arcadeum.games/en/games/critical): Strategic card game — draw, defuse, survive
- [Tic-Tac-Toe](https://arcadeum.games/en/games/tic-tac-toe): Six themed variants, 2–5 players
- [Cascade](https://arcadeum.games/en/games/cascade): Shedding card game with stacking chains
- [Blog](https://arcadeum.games/en/blog): Guides, tutorials, and news
- [Community](https://arcadeum.games/en/community): Join the Arcadeum community
- [Leaderboards](https://arcadeum.games/en/leaderboards): Top players and rankings
- [Tournaments](https://arcadeum.games/en/tournaments): Competitive play schedules
- [Developers](https://arcadeum.games/en/developers): API and integration docs
- [Support](https://arcadeum.games/en/support): Help and contact info
